08 = Tribal 638 Provider-based Facility. A facility or location owned and operated by a federally 
recognized American Indian or Alaska Native tribe or tribal organization under a 638 
agreement, which provides diagnostic, therapeutic (surgical and non-surgical), and 
rehabilitation services to tribal members admitted as inpatients or outpatients. 

09 = Prison/Correctional Facility. A prison, jail, reformatory, work farm,
